entities.name: GROUNDNUT BUD NECROSIS ORTHOTOSPOVIRUS
entities.description: A tripartite single-stranded RNA virus and quarantine pathogen that poses a significant threat to agriculture in the United States.

entities.name: UNITED STATES
entities.description: The country where GBNV is a quarantine pathogen and poses a threat to agriculture.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An economically important crop susceptible to severe damage by GBNV.

entities.name: TOMATO
entities.description: An economically important crop susceptible to severe damage by GBNV.

entities.name: POTATO
entities.description: An economically important crop susceptible to severe damage by GBNV.

entities.name: PEA
entities.description: An economically important crop susceptible to severe damage by GBNV.

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: An economically important crop susceptible to severe damage by GBNV.

entities.name: TAQMAN RT-QPCR
entities.description: A rapid and accurate detection assay developed for GBNV using reverse transcriptase–quantitative polymerase chain reaction.

entities.name: RT-PCR
entities.description: Conventional reverse transcriptase–polymerase chain reaction used to validate the TaqMan assay.

entities.name: SANGER SEQUENCING
entities.description: A sequencing method used to validate the results of the TaqMan assay.

entities.name: NUCLEOCAPSID (NP) PROTEIN
entities.description: A highly conserved region of the viral genome targeted by the GBNV detection assays.

entities.name: MOVEMENT (MP) PROTEIN
entities.description: A highly conserved region of the viral genome targeted by the GBNV detection assays.

entities.name: ACT11
entities.description: An internal control plant gene used in the multiplex GBNV detection assays.

entities.name: QUARANTINE PATHOGEN
entities.description: A biological agent subject to strict controls to prevent its introduction into a country.
